name: chrYp11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome Y p-arm pericentric flank (Yp11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chrY centromere. Distally adjoins the PAR1 / SRY region. Alpha-satellite (DYZ3), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13 (HG002 Y assembly).

architecture.internal_structure: Y-specific alpha-sat HOR (DYZ3) + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distal flank borders PAR1.
